items.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
items.summary: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

items.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
items.summary: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

items.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
items.summary: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."
